allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source; \(Get-Item ''C:\\Users\\CrowKing63\\AppData\\Local\\Programs\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\)?.FullName")
Bash(gh issue comment 6 --repo CrowKing63/Orbital --body "Thanks for the kind words and the suggestion! 🙌:*)

hooks.command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "$input = $env:CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT; if ($input -match '\\.(cs|csproj|xaml)') { $result = & 'C:\Program Files\dotnet\dotnet.exe' build Orbital.csproj --no-restore -v quiet 2>&1; $errors = $result | Select-String -Pattern ' error ' | Where-Object { $_ -notmatch 'obj\\|bin\\' }; if ($errors) { Write-Host '=== 빌드 오류 ==='; $errors | ForEach-Object { Write-Host $_ } } }"

powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "$input = $env:CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT; if ($input -match 'AppData.*Orbital.*settings\.json') { Write-Error 'BLOCK: 런타임 설정 파일(settings.json) 편집 금지. API 키가 포함된 파일입니다.'; exit 1 }"
